untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Candlestick pattern recognition (Abandoned Baby three-candle sequence) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators; (2) Dynamic shadow classification against market median percentages (0.00%, 0.57%, 0.00%, 1.12%) requiring historical distribution analysis; (3) Conditional price targets based on breakout direction and shadow classification (54% vs 53% multipliers) that cannot be pre-computed without pattern state tracking; (4) No allowed indicators for pattern detection, median shadow calculation, or breakout direction determination.
translation_notes: The Abandoned Baby pattern is a three-candle formation requiring sequence recognition and shadow length classification against market conditions. This requires: (a) identifying a specific candlestick pattern across multiple bars (not available in single-bar indicator set), (b) computing dynamic thresholds from market distributions (not available), and (c) stateful rule execution based on pattern context (not supported by condition-based engine). The exit conditions reference computed targets (breakout_high + candle_height × 54%) that are functions of pattern-specific state. A custom pattern detector or indicator preprocessing step would be required.
